title: New put-without-field path has no test coverage
description:
Trigger: regression introduced in the JSON parse path or the vaultrs::kv2::set call for put without ?field=.

The commit removes the only test for put (put_without_field_returns_backend_error) and adds a new code path for put without ?field= that parses JSON and calls vaultrs::kv2::set. This path has zero test coverage — no unit test and no integration test.

The error path (invalid JSON input → DecodeFailed) is testable without a live Vault: if VAULT_TOKEN is set, from_uri succeeds, and serde_json::from_str will fail before making any network call. A unit test for this path could follow the pattern of the removed test (gate on VAULT_TOKEN present).

The happy path (valid JSON object → written to Vault → readable back) needs an integration test. integration_get_full_json does put with ?field= then reads without — there is no test that puts without ?field= and verifies the round-trip.
